name: Peanut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla until light and fluffy.
3. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in the peanuts.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes or until browned and almost set (centers will be soft).
8. Remove from the oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool.
Yield: 4 dozen
